Defendant Bosco Lai'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Bosco Lai's Demurrer To Complaint.

The court re-affirms the tentative ruling issued prior to the August 27 hearing: Defendant Bosco Lai's demurrer to both causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Tian Zhang is sustained with twenty days leave to amend as to both causes of action. The complaint fails to allege defendant Apex Construction's form of business entity. If it is alleged to be a sole proprietorship, then Mr. Lai is legally liable for all of its actions and inactions. If it is alleged to be an entity with separate legal significance, then Mr. Lai is legally liable for its actions and inactions only to the extent that Mr. Lai is the alter ego of Apex and/or personally committed tortious conduct. The complaint also fails to allege that Mr. Lai is the alter ego of Apex or that Mr. Lai personally committed tortious conduct. The complaint also fails to allege a connection between Apex and Mr. Lai to the premises sufficient to support imposition of premises liability. Mr. Zhang is given leave to remedy these deficiencies if he is able to do so. Counsel for plaintiff has submitted to the tentative ruling without need for a hearing.

Counsel for Mr. Lai is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
